title: Living in Boulder vlog 4 - 18 - 19 - 2017: Started BouldeRome page, quit exercising

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about two days in Boulder: a bike ride up Lee Hill where he chatted with older cyclists, a dentist visit revealing he needs fillings and a night guard for grinding, and his decision to stop exercising regularly so he can focus on his website. He spent the day building a 'BouldeRome' timeline page that maps Boulder's history starting in 753 BC onto a compressed calendar beginning January 1, 2018, where each year equals 50 real years.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: quitting — it costs money (bike repairs), halts website work, and not having money is more depressing than being sedentary
excited and committed — wants to launch January 1, 2018 with a historically-mapped compressed calendar
admits he is a poor climber but enjoys the flats and descents

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I got a nose plug so I could go swimming with the snorkel.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I went on a bike ride up Leigh Hill.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: An old guy (around 70) caught up with me and asked if I was going full effort or half effort.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I told the old guy I was going full effort because it was my fifth ride.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Another guy passed me twice while chatting with me.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm not a good climber on the bike.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I saw a place where a dude was getting water from a spigot.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: You can get a lot of water for free at the store in Ward, but after that, it's 25 cents per gallon with a maximum of a gallon per person.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I rode all the way down North P2K, took a photo from a strong stage, and then went down to Lyons and back.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm better on the flats than climbing.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I worked on my website and had to go to the dentist.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The dentist told me I'm a big-time grinder and need a grinding thing.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I have to go back next Wednesday for three fillings.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I decided I'm not going to ride my bike for exercise anymore.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'll get back on the computer as much as I can because biking makes me depressed about not having money.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I realized how much work I have on my website and that biking was halting my progress.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm building a Boulder timeline page starting from January 1st, 2018.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Every year in my timeline will be exactly 50 years, every two years 100 years, and every month 4.25 years.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I have to adjust leap days to keep the timeline symmetrical.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I plan to link the Boulder room, time chart, timeline, and living book together.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I proved I could ride my bike and got some ideas for my bike race page.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm glad I took a couple of days to bike and think about my projects.
